share_info.desc: Certifications Gamified’s comment: 1. For the ISC2, go on Google and type in “ISC2 CC”, click the first link - then click the “free exam and training” button. 2. For the Fortinet certs, type in Google “Fortinet NSE” click the first link, then click “get started”. 3. For the Qualys, type in “Qaulys certification” on Google, click the first link, then click “create an account” and follow the instructions from there.
